settings.heading: Conference & Speaker Mementos
settings.subheading: Dignified mementos to thank speakers, panelists and chief guests at conferences and seminars — engraved crystal and wood with the event, date and a note of thanks. By Meru Trophy.
settings.price_caption: Indicative starting prices in India. Final price depends on size, material and engraving. Bulk discounts apply. GST invoice available.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: For conference and speaker mementos, choose engraved crystal or wooden pieces with the speaker's name, your event title, the date and a line of thanks — from around ₹400. Meru Trophy delivers single pieces or sets for a full panel. WhatsApp +91 78922 07252.

settings.heading: The right award for the moment
settings.text: Thanking a speaker should feel considered. A crystal or wooden memento engraved with the speaker's name, the event, the date and a note of thanks (plus your logo) is the standard, tasteful choice. Order matched sets for a multi-speaker panel or conference.

settings.title: Speaker & event engraved
settings.text: Name, event title, date and thanks.

settings.title: Matched sets
settings.text: Co-ordinated mementos for a full panel.

settings.question: What's a good speaker memento?
settings.answer: An engraved crystal or wooden piece with the speaker's name, your event, the date and a note of thanks.

settings.question: Can you make a matched set for all speakers?
settings.answer: Yes — co-ordinated mementos for the whole panel or conference.

settings.question: Can it carry our event branding?
settings.answer: Yes — event title and logo are engraved free.

settings.question: How quickly can you deliver?
settings.answer: Quickly for single pieces; tell us your event date for sets.

settings.heading: Planning a conference or seminar?
settings.text: Tell us the occasion, recipient and date — we'll share designs and a quote, usually within the hour.
